channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mandago and former officials implicated in Sh1.1bn loan default scandal
item.description: The Auditor-General, Nancy Gathungu, has disclosed that taxpayers could lose Sh1.1 billion due to unpaid housing, car, and student loans issued by former Uasin Gishu Governor Jackson Mandago and his a...

item.title: Kenya Focuses on Women’s Role in Tackling Water Shortages and Improving Access to Clean Water
item.description: Kenya marked World Water Day with a focus on addressing gender inequalities in access to water. Officials highlighted that women and girls bear the brunt of water shortages, with many spending hours e...

item.title: Trillanes files cyber libel complaint against ex-Marines, SMNI hosts over bribery allegations
item.description: Former Philippine senator Antonio 'Sonny' Trillanes IV has filed a cyber libel complaint against 18 former marines and SMNI hosts over allegations that he delivered bribe money to the International Cr...

item.title: Satellite imagery reveals prolonged oil fires and severe pollution in Tehran following bombings
item.description: Satellite images have confirmed that large-scale fires caused by Israeli bombings on Tehran’s oil storage sites continued to burn for days, creating a toxic haze over the Iranian capital. The attacks ...

item.title: South Australian Liberals Depend on Progressive Preferences to Retain Seats
item.description: The South Australian Liberal Party is confronting a severe electoral setback, with predictions suggesting they could be reduced to just five seats after the upcoming state election. The party's relian...

item.title: Delta Festival Controversy: Police Report No Confirmed Rape Cases
item.description: The Delta State Police Command has publicly stated that, as of now, no official reports of rape have been lodged concerning the recently controversial Alue-Do fertility festival held in Ozoro. This fo...

item.title: Bihar Board 12th Result 2026: How to Check BSEB Intermediate Results and Topper List
item.description: The Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) is all set to announce the results for the 12th standard examination of 2026. Students from various streams including Arts, Science, and Commerce have been ea...

item.title: Wallaroos gear up for home Test against Fijiana in Canberra
item.description: The Wallaroos are set to kick off their Test campaign for the year with a home game against Fijiana at Canberra Stadium this Friday. Key players to watch include Faitala Moleka, who has taken on a lea...

item.title: Two Missing Children Found Safe in Trois-Rivières, Suspect Arrested
item.description: An Amber Alert issued in Trois-Rivières, Quebec, concluded on Sunday morning after two young children reported missing on Saturday were found safe in Saint-Paulin, northwest of Trois-Rivières. The ale...

item.title: How to Check Bihar Board Class 12 Results 2026 and Download the Marksheet
item.description: The Bihar Board has announced the Class 12 examination results for 2026. Students who appeared for the examination can now check their results on the official websites of the Bihar School Examination ...

item.title: IEA warns of an energy crisis worse than the 1970s oil shocks as Middle East war escalates
item.description: The ongoing war in the Middle East could spark an energy crisis of unprecedented scale, potentially worse than the oil shocks of the 1970s combined with the impact of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, acc...

item.title: India Reviews Energy Security as West Asia Conflict Escalates and Oil Prices Surge
item.description: An Indian citizen sustained minor injuries in Abu Dhabi after an Iranian ballistic missile was intercepted over the city, the UAE authorities reported. The incident comes amid escalating conflict in W...

item.title: Beatrice Alphonce and Jennifer Mbuya: Women Driving Technology and Social Impact in Tanzania
item.description: In Tanzania, Beatrice Alphonce and Jennifer Mbuya are shaping the future through technology and social engagement. Beatrice, as IT Manager at Airtel Money, ensures millions of daily mobile money trans...

item.title: Nvidia Showcases Olaf Robot Demo at GTC Highlighting Robotics Challenges
item.description: At Nvidia's 2026 GTC conference, CEO Jensen Huang presented a wide-ranging keynote covering advanced graphics technologies, AI strategies, and robotics. A notable highlight was a robot version of Disn...

item.title: Canavan criticises One Nation for double standards on preferences
item.description: Nationals leader Matt Canavan has called out One Nation for its double standards when it comes to preferences. Canavan accused the minor party of demanding Coalition preferences while refusing to retu...

item.title: Gold Prices Drop Amid Inflation Concerns and Middle East Tensions
item.description: Gold prices have taken a significant hit, falling over eight per cent on Monday to reach the lowest level seen in four months. Last week alone, gold recorded its steepest weekly loss in around 43 year...

item.title: PM Modi Highlights India’s Energy Security Amid Diversified Import Sources
item.description: In a significant address to the Lok Sabha on March 23, 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi praised India’s growing energy security, revealing that the country now imports crude oil, LPG, and PNG from 4...

item.title: Pilot and Co-pilot Killed in Runway Collision at LaGuardia Airport, Flights Grounded
item.description: A tragic incident occurred at New York’s LaGuardia Airport when an Air Canada Express plane collided with a fire truck on the runway. The crash, which took place around 11:40 PM on Sunday, led to the ...

item.title: Queensland Children Disadvantaged by Cost of Living and Access Issues
item.description: A recently released report paints a concerning picture for children in Queensland, revealing they are experiencing greater disadvantage compared to their peers in other Australian states. The report h...

item.title: Dangote Refinery Increases Fuel Price to ₦1,245 Amid Global Oil Crisis
item.description: Dangote Refinery don increase petrol price again to ₦1,245 per litre, adding ₦70 to the previous price of ₦1,175. This increase comes as the global oil shortage worsens due to the ongoing conflict bet...
